category_sources: source_facts.description says CMake is a cross-platform make tool.
source_facts.repo points to the official Kitware/CMake repository.
display_name_sources: Official CMake documentation uses the display name CMake.
source_facts.name is cmake and source_facts.homepage is the official CMake site.
docs_sources: Official CMake help site provides the latest manual pages and guides.
Official cmake.org documentation page is a dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Kitware/CMake, so repo was returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists cmake, ccmake, cpack, and ctest.
